# UC-13.7.10 · Fluent Bit Multiline Parser Buffer Stuck and Incomplete Record Detection

## Description

Java stack traces and Windows event bundles depend on multiline state machines; stuck buffers merge unrelated lines or drop tails after timeouts. Trending parser warnings preserves log fidelity for APM and support teams.

## Value

Prevents mangled incidents in Splunk that waste hours of triage on imaginary stack traces.

## Implementation

Set `multiline_parser` field from config. Correlate with log volume spikes on the same host. Tune `flush_ms` and `key_content` regex when stuck_evts rise.

## SPL

```spl
index=fluent sourcetype="fluentbit:log"
| search multiline AND ("buffer" OR "incomplete" OR "flush" OR "timeout" OR "parser")
| eval stuck=if(match(lower(_raw),"(?i)exceeded|truncat|force flush|partial"),1,0)
| bin _time span=15m
| stats sum(stuck) as stuck_evts, count as lines by _time, multiline_parser, host
| where stuck_evts > 0
| sort -stuck_evts
```

## Visualization

Timechart of stuck events, breakdown by parser name, sample raw lines panel.
